diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -21,19 +21,20 @@
         super().__init__()

         self.esm = esm_model

         self.head = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(emb_dim, emb_dim),

+            nn.LayerNorm(emb_dim),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(emb_dim, 256),

             nn.GELU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(emb_dim, 1),

+            nn.Linear(256, 1),

         )

         self.num_layers = esm_model.num_layers

-    def forward(self, tokens):

+    def forward(self, tokens, mask):

         out = self.esm(tokens, repr_layers=[self.num_layers])

         rep = out['representations'][self.num_layers]

-        mask = (tokens != 1) & (tokens != 0) & (tokens != 2)

-        mask = mask.unsqueeze(-1).float()

-        rep = (rep * mask).sum(1) / mask.sum(1).clamp(min=1)

-        return self.head(rep).squeeze(-1)

+        mask_f = mask.unsqueeze(-1).float()

+        pooled = (rep * mask_f).sum(1) / mask_f.sum(1).clamp(min=1)

+        return self.head(pooled).squeeze(-1)

 

 def predict_one(ckpt_path, seqs, device):

     ckpt = torch.load(ckpt_path, map_location=device, weights_only=False)

@@ -50,6 +51,9 @@
         esm_model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t30_150M_UR50D()

         emb_dim = 640

     batch_converter = alphabet.get_batch_converter()

+    pad_idx = alphabet.padding_idx

+    cls_idx = alphabet.cls_idx

+    eos_idx = alphabet.eos_idx

     model = Regressor(esm_model, emb_dim=emb_dim).to(device)

     state = ckpt.get('model_state', ckpt.get('model'))

     model.load_state_dict(state)

@@ -64,8 +68,9 @@
             data = [(str(i), x[1]) for i, x in enumerate(batch)]

             _, _, tokens = batch_converter(data)

             tokens = tokens.to(device)

+            mask = (tokens != pad_idx) & (tokens != cls_idx) & (tokens != eos_idx)

             with torch.cuda.amp.autocast():

-                out = model(tokens)

+                out = model(tokens, mask)

             for j, i in enumerate(idxs):

                 preds[i] = out[j].float().cpu().item()

     del model, esm_model
